positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement. The central subject is a fusion of bioluminescent nebula clouds and geometrically structured flora, resembling stylized cosmic leaves and glowing mandalas. The design should feature clean, thick black outlines contrasting sharply against deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) and touches of neon cyan. Composition must be centrally balanced and perfectly contained within a circular frame suitable for apparel printing. Style: Highly detailed graphic illustration, combining Art Nouveau elegance with modern geometric pop art. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow emanating from the flora and nebula, creating strong silhouettes. Print-friendly, vector art quality, zero gradients, high contrast.
